title: KillFPS+
description: Optimized server modpack for higher FPS, less lag, and smoother multiplayer performance.
body:
This Modpack will increase your FPS in Minecraft. What are you waiting for? Come on!
This server modpack is designed to optimize performance and improve overall stability for multiplayer gameplay. It includes lightweight optimization mods that help the server run smoother, reduce lag, and provide a better experience for all players. Perfect for both small and large servers that want higher performance and stable gameplay.
